items.question: Are your ceramics dishwasher safe?
items.answer: Yes. All tableware is fired for durability and is dishwasher safe, though hand washing helps preserve surface finish over many years.

items.question: Do you make custom restaurant sets?
items.answer: Yes. We collaborate on shape, size, and glaze direction for hospitality projects. Lead time depends on quantity and testing rounds.

items.question: How long does shipping take?
items.answer: In-stock pieces usually ship within 3-5 business days. International delivery windows vary by destination and customs handling.

items.question: Can I visit the studio?
items.answer: Studio visits are available by appointment. We host small weekly slots where you can view current and upcoming work.
